blockers: P185_PRODUCTION_STORAGE_CONFIRMED is not set — local filesystem health alone does not authorize live sends.
P184 is not enabled in live mode (required for canary execution).
setupInstructions: For an intentional local canary only: set P185_PRODUCTION_STORAGE_CONFIRMED=1 in .env.local after confirming this machine's .data path is the intended durable store for the canary. Do not set this on Vercel without a durable volume.
Add CRON_SECRET (or P185_CRON_SECRET) to deployment secrets / .env.local — never commit it. Use Authorization: Bearer <secret> for cron.
Set P185_PRODUCTION_AUTOMATION_ENABLED=1 in the production environment after canary authorization.
When ready for canary: set P184 enabled=true and mode=live via authorized operator control (not via cron body).
warnings: Live sending will not run unless all gates pass and canary is explicitly authorized.
